summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Instagram Clone MVP - both backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with 100% success rate on core features

minor_issues.issue: Some 404 errors in console for missing resources

design_issues.issue: Modern dark aesthetic successfully implemented with gradient branding

passed_tests: User registration flow - create new account works perfectly
User login flow - authenticate with created account works
Backend API endpoints - all 14/14 API tests passed (100% success rate)
User profile page displays with proper stats (posts, followers, following)
User search functionality works in Explore page
Navigation between all pages (Home, Explore, Notifications, Messages, Profile)
Authentication flow with JWT tokens working
Cloudinary integration for image uploads configured
All CRUD operations for posts, likes, comments, follows working
User search and profile management working
Dark theme UI with modern aesthetic implemented correctly
